allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix: Add output redirection to Cobra CLI seed command

Issues identified and fixed:
- Seed was executing silently (no console output) despite success
- Root cause: Cobra SetOut/SetErr not configured
- Solution: Added explicit stdout/stderr configuration

Changes:
- Added os import to cmd/seed/main.go
- Configured Cobra output streams: rootCmd.SetOut(os.Stdout) and SetErr(os.Stderr)
- Created SEED_EXECUTION_REPORT.md documenting issue and solutions
- Validated seed execution with database checks

Impact:
- Seed Fattoria now shows progress messages
- Easier debugging for seed operations
- No functional changes to data insertion

Documentation:
- docs/seed/SEED_ARCHITECTURE.md explains the architecture
- SEED_EXECUTION_REPORT.md documents troubleshooting steps
- Ready for production use

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(bash -c '
set -a
source .env.staging
set +a
echo ""✅ Variáveis carregadas com sucesso:""
echo ""   DB_USER=$DB_USER""
echo ""   DB_NAME=$DB_NAME""
echo ""   ENVIRONMENT=$ENVIRONMENT""
echo ""   BUCKET_CACHE_CONTROL=$BUCKET_CACHE_CONTROL""
')

Bash(bash -c '
set -a
source .env.staging
set +a
echo ""✅ Variáveis carregadas com sucesso:""
echo ""   DB_USER=$DB_USER""
echo ""   DB_NAME=$DB_NAME""
echo ""   ENVIRONMENT=$ENVIRONMENT""
echo ""   BUCKET_CACHE_CONTROL=$BUCKET_CACHE_CONTROL""
echo ""   BUCKET_TIMEOUT=$BUCKET_TIMEOUT""
')
